title: Widget image cache with App Group container
description: Add image cache logic (in Provider.swift or a dedicated ImageCache.swift) backed by the App Group container (FileManager.default.containerURL(forSecurityApplicationGroupIdentifier:)). Cache key is itemId + targetSize encoded as a filename. On each timeline build, enumerate existing cached files and delete any whose item id is not in the current top-5 set, keeping the container from growing unbounded across reloads.
acceptance_criteria: Cache files are written to and read from the App Group container URL
Cache key encodes both item id and target size
Cache hit skips the network download
Pruning deletes files for item ids not in the current top-5 on every timeline build
Cache directory is created if absent on first write
